title: Kinza Razzak

infobox.value: Kinza Razzak   (1992-11-27) 27 November 1992 (age 33)  [Lahore](/wiki/Lahore "Lahore"), [Punjab](/wiki/Punjab,_Pakistan "Punjab, Pakistan"), [Pakistan](/wiki/Pakistan "Pakistan")
* [Actress](/wiki/Actress "Actress") * [Model](/wiki/Model_(person) "Model (person)")
2017 – present

(born 27 November 1992) is a [Pakistani](/wiki/Pakistani "Pakistani") television actress and model.[[1]](#cite_note-TheNewsInternational-1) She has appeared in several television serials, telefilms and advertisements.[[1]](#cite_note-TheNewsInternational-1)[[2]](#cite_note-Dilara-2) She is known for her role as Captain Amber in the women's cricket drama serial *[22 Qadam](/w/index.php?title=22_Qadam&action=edit&redlink=1 "22 Qadam (page does not exist)")* (2023) and as Dil Aara in *[Dilara](/wiki/Dilara_(TV_series) "Dilara (TV series)")* (2018), both of which earned her critical praise.[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-bewaja-5)

["Kinza Razzak steals the show with her acting in 'Dil Aara'"](https://nation.com.pk/11-Jun-2019/kinza-razzak-steals-the-show-with-her-acting-in-dil-aara). *[The Nation](/wiki/The_Nation "The Nation")*. 11 June 2019. Retrieved 18 July 2019.

Sophia Qureshi (3 December 2019). ["Best Female Performances in Pakistani TV Shows 2019"](https://www.masala.com/tv-reviews/best-female-performances-in-pakistani-tv-shows-2019-311635-html). *masala.com*.

["Could Kinza Razzak be the next big superstar of the TV industry?"](https://dailytimes.com.pk/357329/could-kinza-razzak-be-the-next-big-superstar-of-the-tv-industry/). *Daily Times*. 21 February 2019. Retrieved 18 July 2019.

["Kinza Razzak Next Project Bewaja is An Unconventional Love Story!"](https://web.archive.org/web/20221220003833/https://www.hipinpakistan.com/news/1156058). *HIP*. 8 November 2018. Archived from [the original](https://www.hipinpakistan.com/news/1156058) on 20 December 2022. Retrieved 1 March 2020.
["Kinza Razzak as Faysal Quraishi's Leading Lady in 'Log Kia Kahenge'"](https://www.incpak.com/entertainment/kinza-razzak-log-kia-kahenge/). *INCPak*. 2 August 2022.
["Muneeb Butt and Komal Meer gear up for new TV project"](https://en.dailypakistan.com.pk/04-Oct-2022/muneeb-butt-and-komal-meer-gear-up-for-new-tv-project). *Daily Pakistan*. 4 October 2022.

["Kinza Razzak is all set to stun us in a completely different avatar for a sports drama '22 Qadam'"](https://magtheweekly.com/detail/13348-kinza-razzak-is-all-set-to-stun-us-in-a-completely-different-avatar-for-a-sports-drama-22-qadam). *Mag - The Weekly*. 22 October 2022.

Haq, Irfan Ul (2 April 2019). ["Shamoon Abbasi's upcoming web series is about money laundering"](https://images.dawn.com/news/1182254). *[DAWN](/wiki/Dawn_(newspaper) "Dawn (newspaper)")*. Retrieved 18 July 2019.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Pakistani television actress

| Kinza Razzak | |

| کنزا رزاق | |
| Born | Kinza Razzak   (1992-11-27) 27 November 1992 (age 33)  [Lahore](/wiki/Lahore "Lahore"), [Punjab](/wiki/Punjab,_Pakistan "Punjab, Pakistan"), [Pakistan](/wiki/Pakistan "Pakistan") |
| Occupations | * [Actress](/wiki/Actress "Actress") * [Model](/wiki/Model_(person) "Model (person)") |
| Years active | 2017 – present |

**Kinza Razzak** (born 27 November 1992) is a [Pakistani](/wiki/Pakistani "Pakistani") television actress and model.[[1]](#cite_note-TheNewsInternational-1) She has appeared in several television serials, telefilms and advertisements.[[1]](#cite_note-TheNewsInternational-1)[[2]](#cite_note-Dilara-2) She is known for her role as Captain Amber in the women's cricket drama serial *[22 Qadam](/w/index.php?title=22_Qadam&action=edit&redlink=1 "22 Qadam (page does not exist)")* (2023) and as Dil Aara in *[Dilara](/wiki/Dilara_(TV_series) "Dilara (TV series)")* (2018), both of which earned her critical praise.[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-bewaja-5)
